_source: Combined P13 v2 visual-exemplar set. DENTEX (ibrahimhamamci/DENTEX, CC-BY) supplies numbering + pathology (impaction/caries/periapical, FDI-labeled); Zenodo 15487430 (CC-BY-4.0) supplies the HisT/Jaw dimensions DENTEX lacked (implants/crowns/fillings/root-canal + periodontal bone loss). All captions verbatim from real annotations; no tooth numbers invented. Image paths are relative to this file (reference/).
